The script should: 1) create the output folder if missing, 2) recursively find .md files, 3) convert markdown to HTML using the 'markdown' library if available, otherwise fall back to a simple minimal converter that wraps plain text in HTML and preserves line breaks, 4) write each HTML file with the same base name as the markdown file, 5) include a simple title in the HTML derived from the filename, and 6) print a summary of converted files. Also include a short note at the top explaining how to run it. Make the code robust and well-commented.
